steps.title: Calculate water lost
steps.content:
The bowl started with 24 ounces and now contains 10 ounces.
$$\text{Water lost} = 24 - 10 = 14 \text{ ounces}$$

steps.title: Convert water loss to days using the rate
steps.content:
The water decreases by 1 ounce every 3 days. For 14 ounces of loss:
$$\text{Days uncovered} = 14 \text{ ounces} \times \frac{3 \text{ days}}{1 \text{ ounce}} = 42 \text{ days}$$
That matches Choice D — $42$.
